title: db.rs balance(): unwrap_or(i64::MAX) gives wrong confirmed balance at extreme scan_tip
description: db.rs WalletStore::balance(), line ~1042: when scan_tip - min_confirmations overflows i64 (theoretically possible because scan_tip is u64), the threshold falls back to i64::MAX via unwrap_or(i64::MAX). Since every real block_height is <= i64::MAX, the condition 'block_height <= i64::MAX' is always true, so every note is counted as confirmed regardless of actual depth. The correct behavior is to return an Err, not silently produce an incorrect balance. In practice scan_tip fits in i64 for real Zcash heights (u32 range), so this requires a pathological scan_tip (e.g. from a rogue server returning height > i64::MAX), but the i64::try_from().unwrap_or(i64::MAX) pattern is incorrect. Fix: propagate the error instead of substituting i64::MAX.
